info.title: Solar O&M Performance Monitoring API
info.description: Brand-agnostic solar system performance monitoring. IEC 61724-1:2021 weather-corrected Performance Ratio. Age-adjusted expected output (Jordan & Kurtz 2013 degradation model). Root cause probability scoring. Revenue loss quantification. Works with any inverter brand — just pass kWh produced.

post.description:
Quick O&M performance screen from basic inputs.
Pass system capacity, actual kWh produced, age, and climate zone.
Returns IEC 61724-1 Performance Ratio, underperformance gap,
revenue loss, and fault diagnosis. Free plan.

Full O&M performance analysis per IEC 61724-1:2021.
Pro plan required.
Analyse up to 50 solar systems simultaneously. Pro plan required.

systems.title: Systems
systems.description: List of up to 50 systems to analyse simultaneously.

capacity_kw.title: Capacity Kw
capacity_kw.description: System nameplate DC capacity in kW.

actual_kwh.title: Actual Kwh
actual_kwh.description: Actual energy produced in the reporting period (kWh).

system_age_years.title: System Age Years
system_age_years.description: System age in years since commissioning.

irradiance_kwh_m2.title: Irradiance Kwh M2
irradiance_kwh_m2.description: Measured plane-of-array irradiation in kWh/m² for the reporting period. Required for IEC 61724-1 compliant PR calculation. If not supplied, estimated from climate zone.

avg_ambient_temp_c.title: Avg Ambient Temp C
avg_ambient_temp_c.description: Average ambient temperature in °C during the reporting period.

ppa_rate_usd.title: Ppa Rate Usd
ppa_rate_usd.description: PPA rate in USD/kWh if different from retail rate. Used for C&I revenue loss.

months_since_cleaning.title: Months Since Cleaning
months_since_cleaning.description: Months since last panel cleaning. Used in fault diagnosis.

time_of_day_pattern.title: Time Of Day Pattern
time_of_day_pattern.description: If the underperformance has a time-of-day pattern, specify: uniform, midday, morning, afternoon. Improves fault diagnosis accuracy.

deviation_onset.title: Deviation Onset
deviation_onset.description: How the underperformance appeared: sudden (fault event), gradual (progressive), step_change (discrete drop). Improves fault diagnosis accuracy.

capacity_kw.title: Capacity Kw
capacity_kw.description: System nameplate DC capacity in kW.

actual_kwh.title: Actual Kwh
actual_kwh.description: Actual energy produced in the reporting period (kWh).

system_age_years.title: System Age Years
system_age_years.description: System age in years since commissioning.

climate_zone.title: Climate Zone
climate_zone.description: Climate zone. Values: hot_arid, hot_humid, mixed, cold, marine, tropical

module_type.title: Module Type
module_type.description: PV module technology for degradation rate.

reporting_period_months.title: Reporting Period Months
reporting_period_months.description: Length of the reporting period in months (1–12). Default: 12.

electricity_rate_usd.title: Electricity Rate Usd
electricity_rate_usd.description: Electricity rate in USD/kWh for revenue loss calculation.
